data.title: Bellevue Gold Limited Extends Trading Suspension Amid Production Challenges
data.description:
Bellevue Gold Limited ( (AU:BGL) ) has shared an announcement.

Bellevue Gold Limited has announced an update regarding the voluntary suspension of its trading shares, initially granted on 28 March 2025. The company is unable to provide its ‘Updated Production Guidance Announcement’ due to lower than anticipated gold production in the March 2025 quarter, which was affected by underperforming stopes and rapid mining rates leading to grade dilution. As a result, the company’s securities will remain suspended under ASX Listing Rule 17.3 until it can reasonably update the market on its production outlook.

More about Bellevue Gold Limited

Bellevue Gold Limited is a company operating in the gold mining industry, focusing on the exploration and production of gold. The company is listed on the Australian Securities Exchange (ASX) under the ticker BGL.

YTD Price Performance: 2.23%

Average Trading Volume: 9,725,329

Technical Sentiment Signal: Strong Buy

Current Market Cap: A$1.47B

See more data about BGL stock on TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: Hillgrove Resources Expands Market Presence with New Securities Issuance
data.description:
Hillgrove Resources Limited ( (AU:HGO) ) has provided an update.

Hillgrove Resources Limited announced the issuance of 143,847,094 fully paid ordinary securities, which will be quoted on the Australian Securities Exchange (ASX) under the code HGO. This move is part of previously announced transactions, potentially enhancing the company’s capital base and market presence.

More about Hillgrove Resources Limited

Hillgrove Resources Limited operates in the mining industry, focusing primarily on the extraction and production of mineral resources. The company is known for its involvement in copper and gold mining projects, positioning itself as a significant player in the resources sector.

data.title: Promino Nutritional Sciences Closes Oversubscribed Private Placement
data.description:
Element Nutritional Sciences Inc ( (TSE:MUSL) ) has shared an update.

Promino Nutritional Sciences Inc. has successfully closed an oversubscribed private placement, raising $864,050, surpassing their initial target of $750,000. The funds will be used to boost sales and fulfillment of their sports beverages, settle liabilities, and support general working capital, potentially enhancing their market position in the nutraceutical industry.

More about Element Nutritional Sciences Inc

Promino Nutritional Sciences Inc. is a Canadian nutraceutical company based in Burlington, Ontario, specializing in the development of patented, science-based products for muscle health. The company offers products like Rejuvenate Muscle Activator and Promino, which are designed to assist in muscle building, recovery, and strength enhancement for both professional and amateur athletes.

Average Trading Volume: 171,992

Technical Sentiment Signal: Strong Buy

data.title: Ventia Services Group Updates on Market Buy-Back Program
data.description:
Ventia Services Group Limited ( (AU:VNT) ) has shared an update.

Ventia Services Group Limited has announced an update regarding its ongoing on-market buy-back program. As of April 4, 2025, the company has repurchased a total of 4,264,025 ordinary fully paid securities, with 537,892 bought back on the previous day. This buy-back initiative is part of Ventia’s strategy to optimize its capital structure and potentially enhance shareholder value.

More about Ventia Services Group Limited

data.title: News Corporation Announces Changes in Beneficial Ownership
data.description:
An announcement from News Corporation Shs B Chess Depository Interests repr 1 Sh ( (AU:NWS) ) is now available.

News Corporation has filed a Form 4 with the Securities and Exchange Commission, indicating changes in beneficial ownership of its Class A common stock. This filing reflects the acquisition and subsequent disposal of shares by a director, highlighting ongoing adjustments in the company’s equity structure, which may impact its market dynamics and investor relations.

More about News Corporation Shs B Chess Depository Interests repr 1 Sh

News Corporation is a global, diversified media and information services company that focuses on creating and distributing authoritative and engaging content. The company operates across various media sectors, including information services and news, digital real estate services, book publishing, and subscription video services, primarily in the United States, Australia, and the United Kingdom.
